description: vppup.in appears to host Uttar Pradesh vocational training/ITI information pages, including public institute profile and affiliation documents. The discoverable public surface is a web application for viewing institute data rather than a documented developer platform.
summary: vppup.in exposes a public HTTP website surface for ITI profile/report pages on update.vppup.in; no developer APIs, GraphQL endpoints, MCP servers, CLIs, or authentication mechanisms were found.
